=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (5:33-5:87) TS377038: This `Schema.Union` contains multiple `Schema.Literal` members and can be simplified to a single `Schema.Literal` call. effect(schemaUnionOfLiterals)
  Fix 0: "Disable schemaUnionOfLiterals for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable schemaUnionOfLiterals for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Replace with a single Schema.Literal call"

=== Quick Fix Application Results ===

=== [D1] Fix 0: "Disable schemaUnionOfLiterals for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 1: "Disable schemaUnionOfLiterals for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 2: "Replace with a single Schema.Literal call" ===

--- file:///.src/schemaUnionOfLiterals.ts ---
// @effect-v3
// @effect-diagnostics schemaUnionOfLiterals:warning
import { Schema } from "effect"

export const thisShouldReport = Schema.Literal("A", "B")

export const noSenseForSingleMemberUnion = Schema.Union(Schema.Literal("A"))
